meaning: n.继续,续集,延长,延长物,扩建物,附加部分,(报刊等的)续刊、增刊,续篇
examples: This chapter is a continuation of Chapter 8.
He predicts a continuation of healthy profits in the current financial year.
This lesson is a continuation of our last lesson.
Still, the prospects for a continuation of low rates are nevertheless friendly for precious metals.
The daily chart shows several continuation patterns (dotted lines) that were brief interruptions in the downtrend.
